decision_summary: Approve v9.3 Capability-First Release Comprehension as the current release gate.
rationale: The release directly addresses user feedback that versions were not understandable as capability and adds runtime verification for the fix.
recommendation: Release after full verification passes; resume provider execution candidate in v9.4.
expected_user_reaction: User can explain v9.3 in 30 seconds as capability-first release governance.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep release notes capability-first before mechanism details.
organization_change_recommendations: Treat unclear release delta feedback as product review trigger.
